arts.ttl: Liverpool could look to raid top-three PL side for 22-year-old after scouting him
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly keeping tabs on the Nottingham Forest midfielder Elliot Anderson. The 22-year-old is currently playing for Nottingham Forest and Liverpool have sent scouts to watch him in action. According to reports via GeordieBootBoys, Liverpool are keen on the highly rated midfielder. arts.sum: Garnacho, 20, was left out entirely for the derby victory against Manchester City last month, alongside Marcus Rashford, and has been benched for the last four games.
